Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jade Smith-Williams, Esq. 415-981-7210 of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger for Plaintiff.
Robert Taitz, Esq. and Allison Lawrence, Esq. 628-253-5070 of Tyson & Mendes for Defendant Uber.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARGARET SCHIMMEL, JOSEPH SCHIMMEL's Re-Noticed Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.Plaintiffs' motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and request for monetary sanctions are GRANTED. The sanctions are $2,100. (See CCP 2031.300(c), 2031.310(h).)

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
